title: TikTok Scraper Pro Input
description: Configure what TikTok data to scrape. Supports URLs, profiles, hashtags, search queries, and trending.

urls.title: TikTok URLs
urls.description: List of TikTok URLs (videos, profiles, hashtags, sounds). Short URLs (vm.tiktok.com) are auto-resolved.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: List of TikTok usernames or @handles to scrape

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of results per search query

maxVideos.title: Max Videos
maxVideos.description: Maximum number of videos to scrape per profile/hashtag

maxComments.title: Max Comments
maxComments.description: Maximum number of comments to scrape per video

region.title: Region
region.description: Region code for trending and localized results

includeTrending.title: Include Trending
includeTrending.description: Scrape trending hashtags for the selected region

includeEngagement.title: Include Engagement Metrics
includeEngagement.description: Calculate engagement metrics for scraped profiles

includeComments.title: Include Comments
includeComments.description: Scrape comments for videos found in profiles
